description_long: This object is a plump, round apple with a smooth, glossy red skin and a subtle highlight indicating a waxy surface. A single, slightly curved brown stem protrudes from the top, accompanied by a single green leaf that is broad and slightly curved. The apple's body is mostly symmetrical, with a gentle taper toward the bottom and a slight bulge at the sides, giving it a classic apple silhouette. The skin appears unblemished and uniform in color, with no visible marks or imperfections. The stem has a textured, woody appearance, while the leaf is matte and vibrant green. The overall look is fresh and appetizing, resembling a typical market apple.
description: A glossy red apple with a brown stem and green leaf, smooth and unblemished.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full red apple, brown stem, and green leaf clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with the apple appearing narrow, stem and leaf aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the leaf now angled to the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, apple appears narrow, green leaf more visible from behind.
